query: can you open this figma link and tell me if our design system is well organized? https://figma.com/design/abc123/BankApp-DS?node-id=0-1
notes: Direct audit request with Figma URL

query: our figma ds file has like 40 pages and nobody knows what goes where anymore, can you help clean it up?
notes: Restructuring request, informal language

query: i want to check if our color tokens follow semantic naming or if they're all still named like red-500 and blue-200
notes: Token naming audit — should trigger even without 'design system' keyword

query: we have a button component in figma but it's missing disabled and loading states, can you audit it and tell me what's missing?
notes: Component state audit

query: help me set up a maintenance and governance page in our figma design system for a mobile banking app
notes: Governance setup — explicit DS + fintech context

query: i need to add descriptions to all our components in figma so the dev team can understand them during handoff
notes: Component documentation — write operation in Figma

query: does our figma file have proper dark mode token support? we only have one mode in our variable collection right now
notes: Variable/token mode audit

query: we're building a pin pad and otp screen for our banking app — can you check if the components in our figma file cover all the states we need?
notes: Fintech-specific component audit

query: refactor our figma design system to follow atomic design principles and make sure everything is named consistently
notes: Full refactor request

query: audit our figma file and generate a report showing what's missing from our design system
notes: Audit + report generation

query: can you design a new color palette for our banking app? we want to move from blue to teal as our primary
notes: Visual redesign — out of scope; this skill does not do brand repositioning

query: export all assets from our figma file as SVGs so i can use them in the react native app
notes: Asset export task — not an audit/refactor; different workflow

query: generate react components from our figma design system automatically
notes: Code generation — this skill is Figma-side only, not code-side

query: i have a pdf of our old brand guidelines, can you extract the color hex values and typography specs?
notes: PDF extraction — no Figma involved, different skill needed

query: can you build me a design system from scratch for a new fintech startup? we have nothing yet, starting from zero
notes: Build from scratch — skill is audit/refactor of existing DS, not greenfield creation

query: review the accessibility of our mobile app screens — specifically check tap target sizes and color contrast on the transfer flow
notes: Screen-level accessibility review, not DS audit — adjacent but different scope

query: we're about to do a design-to-dev handoff for our card management feature, what should we prepare?
notes: Handoff planning advice — doesn't require Figma file audit

query: write figma plugin code to auto-rename all layers that don't follow our naming convention
notes: Plugin development — coding task, not DS audit/refactor agent workflow

query: open our figma file and check if the button component uses the correct primary color token or if it's hardcoded
notes: Token compliance check within a component — should trigger

query: our design system figma file needs a proper archive section for deprecated components, can you set that up?
notes: Governance / archive setup — directly in skill scope
